programName: Lead Service Line Replacement Pilot Program
subsidyType: interest-based pilot program for selected private lead service line replacements backed by federal and state funding
publicSideCovered: no separate public-side claim because Dubuque says the service line from the water main to the meter is customer-owned in Dubuque
privateSideCovered: selected eligible private lead service lines can be replaced through the city pilot at no cost to the owner or tenant
propertyRules: eligibility depends on current pilot-area criteria Water Department review and city outreach after interest forms are submitted
contractorRules: property owners submit the interest form and complete verification or consent steps if the city selects the address
